vanilla_behavior: Short-term shrine blessings are received by activating shrines; only one shrine blessing can normally be active at a time
mod_design_use: Baseline for shrine layering and cure privilege
caution: Do not accidentally overwrite vanilla blessings unless deliberately replacing shrine behavior.

vanilla_behavior: Shrines commonly cure disease when blessing is applied
caution: Disease cure can trivialize disease-based neglect unless a mod separates systems.

mod_design_use: Compare magnitude/duration against custom Akatosh-style boons
caution: Exact effect values should be rechecked before implementation.
Avoid overlapping disease and death mechanics too heavily.
Speech bonuses are immediately useful but can affect economy.
Project-specific Kyne/Kynareth theology may be culturally specific; do not flatten without intent.
Marriage/adoption signals should be curated, not automatic spam.
Justice can become punitive; keep recovery paths.
Talos blessing has political meaning in 4E 201.
Economy effects can be farmed or overpowered.

vanilla_behavior: Nonstandard shrine blessing associated with Thieves Guild access
caution: Access is questline-located; do not treat as public temple pattern.
Dawnguard dependency and theology spelling require care.
